title: Mekanism Generators
body: Mekanism Generators is an official addon to Mekanism that adds various generators and ways to produce energy. Without this module you will need some other mod to be able to produce energy for your Mekanism machines. Features: - Heat Generator - Gas-Burning Generator - Bio-Generator - Solar Generator - Advanced Solar Generator - Wind Generator - Fission Reactor - Fusion Reactor - Turbine Links to other Mekanism modules: - [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism) - [Mekanism Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-additions) - [Mekanism Tools](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-tools)
